title: achras buchananiifolia
intro: Achras buchananiifolia, also known as the Buchanania fruit or Buchanania nut, is a tropical plant species belonging to the family Anacardiaceae, native to tropical regions of Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Achras buchananiifolia include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and treat various infections, making it a valuable resource in herbal medicine. Herbal preparations of Achras buchananiifolia are typically made by drying the fruit or seeds and using them in teas, infusions, or as a powder to harness its medicinal properties.
